entries.notes: ALERT: Second confirmed outage at 16:34 IST. Site aadesh-ai.in is DOWN (ECONNREFUSED). VPS IP 165.232.176.181. First outage was 11:13-11:16 (3 min). This second outage started ~16:29 and is still active at 16:34. Srinivas must manually restart Nginx/PM2 on VPS. No order costs — 0 orders today. All Paperclip agent costs are subscription_included.

site_events.detail: HTTP 000 from local agent check — possible second outage or local network issue
ECONNREFUSED 165.232.176.181:443 — confirmed via curl + WebFetch. Site is DOWN. Nginx or Next.js app may be crashed on VPS.

api_cost_breakdown.note: 29 orders in Supabase as of 2026-04-13. Estimate: ~50% premium (Sonnet) × 29 × $0.086 = ~$1.25. Conservative estimate — actual may be lower if most orders used Sarvam free model.

entries.notes: First Priya run. Pulled data from: Supabase (29 orders, 6 users via TEAM_LOG 2026-04-13), CTMO audit (actual cost Rs 3-4/order = ~$0.043-0.048), cost_log.json (March 30 baseline). VPS upgraded to $0.40/day estimate (DigitalOcean). All Paperclip agents are subscription_included — zero incremental cost. Streamlit app has 5 dev/test orders in generated_orders folder (not counted as production).
